To find \(\nabla \times \mathbf{a}\) at \((1, -2, 1)\) for \(\mathbf{a} = x^2y^2\mathbf{i} + 2xyz\mathbf{j} + z^2\mathbf{k}\), compute the curl:

\[
\nabla \times \mathbf{a} =
\begin{vmatrix}
\mathbf{i} & \mathbf{j} & \mathbf{k} \\
\frac{\partial}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial}{\partial y} & \frac{\partial}{\partial z} \\
x^2y^2 & 2xyz & z^2
\end{vmatrix}
